semantic.role: ArchSpine project configuration for the mirror system
responsibilities: Initial state management for agent instructions and ignore files
invariants: mcp.contextMode must be 'off' to prevent MCP context risks
scanPolicy.fileSource must be 'git-tracked' to restrict scanning to version-controlled files
artifact.strategy must be 'distributable' for consistent artifact output
protocolExclusions and protocolInclusions must be correctly configured to avoid scanning internal configuration

English.role: ArchSpine project configuration for the mirror system

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Defines the configuration schema version; must match expected format.
parameter_definitions.project.name: Identifies the project name; used for labeling artifacts.
parameter_definitions.project.locales: Supported locales for documentation; currently English and Simplified Chinese.
parameter_definitions.mcp.contextMode: Controls the MCP context mode; 'off' disables context injection for safety.
parameter_definitions.hooks.preCommit: Enables or disables pre-commit hooks; false by default to avoid unintended automation.
parameter_definitions.hooks.syncMode: Defines synchronization mode; set to 'hook' means hooks trigger sync.
parameter_definitions.artifacts.strategy: Artifact generation strategy; 'distributable' means artifacts are packaged for distribution.
parameter_definitions.artifacts.experimentalViewLayer: Enables experimental view layer for new UI features; potentially unstable.
parameter_definitions.artifacts.enabledViews: List of enabled architectural views for artifact generation.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.fileSource: Determines which files are scanned; 'git-tracked' limits to files in Git.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolExclusions: Directories excluded from scanning; ensures .spine/ is excluded except specific inclusions.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolInclusions: Directories explicitly included in scanning despite exclusions.
parameter_definitions.initState.artifactStrategy: Initial artifact strategy; must match artifacts.strategy.
parameter_definitions.initState.agentInstructionsCreatedByArch: Whether the agent instructions file was created by ArchSpine; false indicates user-managed.
parameter_definitions.initState.searchIgnoreManaged: Whether ArchSpine manages search ignore file.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration establishes critical boundaries and defaults for the ArchSpine mirror system. Incorrect settings may lead to unintended file scanning, leakage of internal configuration, or disruption of artifact generation processes. Particularly, enabling mcp.contextMode or hooks.preCommit could introduce security vulnerabilities or automation conflicts. The scanning policy ensures that only git-tracked files are considered, and protocol exclusions protect internal directories while allowing necessary files. The initState booleans indicate whether ArchSpine or the user manages various configuration files, affecting upgrade safety and customization.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 镜像系统的项目配置

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 定义配置架构版本，必须与预期格式一致。
parameter_definitions.project.name: 标识项目名称，用于标记生成的工件。
parameter_definitions.project.locales: 支持的文档语言环境，当前包括英语和简体中文。
parameter_definitions.mcp.contextMode: 控制 MCP 上下文模式；设为 'off' 可禁用上下文注入，确保安全。
parameter_definitions.hooks.preCommit: 启用或禁用预提交钩子；默认为 false 以避免意外自动化。
parameter_definitions.hooks.syncMode: 定义同步模式；设为 'hook' 表示通过钩子触发同步。
parameter_definitions.artifacts.strategy: 工件生成策略；'distributable' 表示工件被打包以供分发。
parameter_definitions.artifacts.experimentalViewLayer: 启用实验性视图层以支持新 UI 功能；可能存在不稳定风险。
parameter_definitions.artifacts.enabledViews: 启用的架构视图列表，用于工件生成。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.fileSource: 确定扫描哪些文件；'git-tracked' 将扫描范围限制在 Git 跟踪的文件。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.ignoreChain.inheritGitIgnore: 若为 true，则继承 .gitignore 中的排除模式。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.ignoreChain.projectIgnore: 指定项目专属的忽略文件。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolExclusions: 排除扫描的目录，确保除了特定包含项外 .spine/ 目录被排除。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolInclusions: 在排除基础上明确包含的扫描目录。
parameter_definitions.initState.artifactStrategy: 初始工件策略，必须与 artifacts.strategy 一致。
parameter_definitions.initState.agentInstructionsCreatedByArch: 代理指令文件是否由 ArchSpine 创建；false 表示用户自行管理。
parameter_definitions.initState.spineIgnoreManaged: ArchSpine 是否管理 .spineignore 文件。
parameter_definitions.initState.searchIgnoreManaged: ArchSpine 是否管理搜索忽略文件。
parameter_definitions.initState.gitIgnoreManaged: ArchSpine 是否管理 .gitignore 文件。
parameter_definitions.initState.gitAttributesManaged: ArchSpine 是否管理 .gitattributes 文件。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置为 ArchSpine 镜像系统设定了关键边界和默认值。错误的配置可能导致非预期文件扫描、内部配置泄露或工件生成流程中断。尤其是启用 mcp.contextMode 或 hooks.preCommit 可能引入安全漏洞或自动化冲突。扫描策略确保仅考虑 Git 跟踪的文件，协议排除规则保护内部目录同时允许必要的文件。initState 中的布尔值指示 ArchSpine 或用户管理各个配置文件，影响升级安全性和自定义灵活性。
